name: Stria Lithium Inc.
description: Stria Lithium Inc. is a Canadian junior mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of lithium properties in North America. The company's flagship project is the Pontax Lithium Project located in the James Bay region of Quebec, a prolific mining jurisdiction. Stria is dedicated to developing high-purity lithium products to support the growing global demand for electric vehicle batteries and energy storage solutions. By leveraging strategic partnerships and advanced exploration techniques, Stria aims to create sustainable value for its shareholders while contributing to the green energy transition.
